personal.name: Yamen Muammar
personal.title: Software Developer
personal.bio: Software developer dedicated to building impactful digital experiences ,specialized in backend technologies, crafting data-driven desktop and web applications using C# and SQL Server with a focus on clean architecture and real-world problem solving.

projects.title: DVLD System
projects.description: A comprehensive driving license management system built with C# and WinForms. Handles license issuance, renewals, applicant records, and test scheduling — backed by a relational SQL Server database with full CRUD operations and business logic layers.

projects.title: Tech Store
projects.description: Tech Store is a cross-platform (web, mobile, desktop) centralized by backend API to manage computer component inventories using SQL Server, implementing Create, Read, Update, and Delete (CRUD) operations for products and orders. Business logic layers ensure inventory integrity, while a secure API connects the front-end interfaces to the database.

projects.title: Bank Desktop Application
projects.description: Simple Bank System for Educational Purposes.
